vibe: Premium glassmorphism, minimalistic editor, sleek, no clutter, rich-looking dark background

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 for panels to let content breathe.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-72 fixed h-screen border-r border-white/10 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-3xl flex flex-col justify-between
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main panels, rounded-xl for inner components

components.GlassCard: bg-zinc-900/30 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]
components.ButtonPrimary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-medium transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-center
components.ButtonSecondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-medium transition-all duration-300
components.Input: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-white/30 focus:bg-zinc-900/80 transition-all
components.Chip: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-sm text-zinc-300 backdrop-blur-md flex items-center gap-2
components.RatioCard: relative group cursor-pointer overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-6 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300
components.SceneEditorCard: bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-4 flex gap-4 items-center hover:border-white/20 transition-all cursor-pointer

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all glassmorphism panels use backdrop-blur-2xl with a very low opacity background (e.g., bg-white/5 or bg-zinc-950/40) for a premium crystal look.
Include a 1px soft border (border-white/10) on all glass panels to define their edges perfectly.
Do not use generic 'Inter' font. Apply 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Update the fonts in the main HTML/CSS.
Avoid loud, multi-color gradients. Keep the color palette extremely restricted (monochrome/dark zinc with crisp white text for high contrast).
The layout should feature a fixed left sidebar (step navigator) and a main scrollable content area. Both must use the dark premium background.
Implement 6 steps: Ratio Selection, Brand Deck, Script Input, AI Analysis, Video Preview, Export.
For the Video Preview/Editor mock, use the provided b_roll_mock images in a horizontal timeline or scene cards.
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, selectable cards) have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
Do NOT use thick, solid backgrounds for cards; stick exclusively to the glassmorphism aesthetic.
